results.instruction: Use an arm to drop the cup with light blue color on the grainy texture coaster
Use an arm to place the cup with smooth plastic surface on the wooden coaster
Grab the cylindrical light blue cup and lower it onto the flat surface gray wooden coaster
Move the smooth blue cup for liquids onto the light gray streaked wooden coaster with the arm
Use an arm to place the cup with light blue color on the wooden coaster
Stick the rounded base blue cup onto the coaster made of smooth wood using the arm.
Position the cup with light blue color on the light gray streaked wooden coaster with the arm.
Stick the medium-sized plastic blue cup onto the wooden coaster carefully.
Direct the rounded base blue cup to the coaster with circular shape and let it rest.
Grab the medium blue cylindrical cup, then place it onto the light gray round grainy coaster.
Set the smooth blue cup for liquids down on the wooden coaster
Move the cup for holding liquids to the smooth round palm-sized coaster using the arm.
Carefully place the blue rounded-bottom cup onto the grainy texture coaster without arm
Place the smooth blue cup for liquids on top of the flat surface gray wooden coaster
Move the cup with smooth plastic surface to the coaster with circular shape and set it down.
Move the medium blue cylindrical cup onto the wooden coaster with the arm
Use the arm to set the medium-sized plastic blue cup on the round coaster
Grab the plastic cup for drinks and place it over the flat round wooden coaster.
Set the light blue plastic cup carefully onto the smooth round palm-sized coaster
Set the light blue plastic cup on the light gray streaked wooden coaster using the arm.
